metadata.description: Praxis — an enterprise-grade quality harness and autonomous task engine for Claude Code. Restructure any prompt into a spec, plan, implement to production standard with the right engineering best-practices, audit (adversarial/regression/duplication/performance/edge-case/completeness/doc-first), and keep the project's living knowledge (/docs, CHANGELOG, ADRs) current with no regression.

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Turn a terse prompt into a complete, production-ready change with living documentation: restructure → investigate → plan → implement (code-craft + best-practices) → full audit → update /docs, CHANGELOG and ADRs → structured report, then an optional reviewable PR. Bootstraps any repo, keeps CLAUDE.md and docs verified and regression-free, runs fully autonomous in auto-pilot, and gates every change so nothing is placeholdered, undocumented, or silently out of scope.
